steps.title: Identify the initial value
steps.content: At the time of posting, the channel had $53$ subscribers. That is the starting value, so it is the value when $d=0$.

steps.title: Use the doubling factor
steps.content:
Doubling each day means multiplying by $2$ once for each day after posting. For $d$ days, that repeated multiplication is represented by an exponent:
$$
n=53(2)^d
$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: The plotted checkpoints follow the same doubling pattern as the exponential model: $53$, $106$, $212$, then $424$. The answer is B.
